# Agent Engine Optimization

> Research hub and strategy consultancy for making websites, APIs and digital infrastructure readable, trustworthy and actionable for autonomous AI agents.

## Core definition

Agent Engine Optimization (AEO) is the discipline of structuring websites, APIs, data and digital services so autonomous AI agents can discover them, understand their capabilities and execute actions through them.

## Primary concepts

- Read Layer: content optimization for AI discovery, summarization and citation
- Execution Layer: infrastructure optimization for autonomous agent actions
- Key protocols: MCP, A2A, UCP, x402, ACP, AP2
- Core outcomes: discoverability, parsability, trust, actionability, verification

## Start here

- [What is Agent Engine Optimization?](https://agent-engine-optimization.com/docs/what-is-aeo/)
